rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Sir, are you not coming to the garden now ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What work should we all do today ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: niivella agiiri ; hattu gantege tindi tinni.
rows.english: All of you dig ; at ten O' clock have breakfast.

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: niinuu agi ; hattu gantege tindi tinnu.
rows.english: You also dig ; have breakfast at ten

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: iiga naanu hooglaa ? ond ganntege manege hoogbooda ?
rows.english: May I leave now ? Shall we go home at one O' clock ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: All of you go home at one.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Let it play. What is the dog doing ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: avu adli. elligaadruu hoogli iig ningeenu ?
rows.english: Let them play, Let them go anywhere. Why do you bother ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Radha and Ranga are also playing.

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: oohoo ! raadhaa aadli, rangaanuu adli ; ellaruaadli.
rows.english: Oh ! Let Radha play and Ranga too. Let all play.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What shall I do ? Shall I also play ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Get lost, you too go and play.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Shall we go to a movie to-day ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Let us see, to which theatre shall we go ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Shall we go to 'Sangam' ? 'Grahana' is running there.
